reasoning: The CP-2 Contingency Plan control primarily focuses on ensuring that cloud resources have deletion protection and multi-availability zone configurations to maintain availability and recoverability in case of failures. These checks are specific to cloud infrastructure resources like load balancers and database instances, which do not have direct equivalents in Kubernetes. Kubernetes focuses more on application-level availability and resilience, such as through pod replication, node failover, and persistent volume claims, rather than infrastructure-level deletion protection or multi-AZ configurations.
title: Contingency Plan
